100.full_name: al-﻿'Abbas ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
100.arabic: العباس بن عبد المطلب بن هاشم
100.mother_name: Nutaylah bint janab bin Kulayb al-Khazriji

101.full_name: 'Abdullah ibn 'Abd al-Asad bin Hilal b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah b. Murrah
101.arabic: عبد الله بن عبد الأسد أبو سلمة
101.bio: old Name: 'Abdul Manaf. He was injured during Uhud and died after sometime.

102.full_name: Ruqayyah bint Muhammad b 'Abdullah b Abdul Muttalib b Hashim b Abdul Munaf b Qusayy b Kilab b Murrah
102.arabic: رقية بنت محمد بن عبد الله
102.bio: She Migrated to Abyssinia twice with her husband 'Uthman bin Affan.

103.arabic: عبد الله بن سلام بن الحارث أبو يوسف
103.bio: Abdullah ibn Salam ibn al-Harith was a rabbi of aristocratic stock before converting to Islam.

104.full_name: Hadrad bin Salama b. 'Umayr b. Abi Salama b. Sa'd b. Musaab b. al-Harith b. 'Abs b. Hawazan b. Aslam
104.bio: Full Lineage: Hadrad bin Abi Hadrad (Salama or 'Ubaid or 'Abd) b. 'Umayr b. Abi Salama b. Sa'd b. Musaab(Sinan) b. al-Harith b. 'Abs b. Hawazan b. Aslam b. Afsi

105.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Salama b. 'Umayr b. Abi Salama b. Sa'd b. Musaab b. al-Harith b. 'Abs b. Hawazan
105.bio: Full Lineage: 'Abdullah bin Abi Hadrad (Salama or 'Ubaid or 'Abd) b. 'Umayr b. Abi Salama b. Sa'd b. Musaab(Sinan) b. al-Harith b. 'Abs b. Hawazan b. Aslam b. Afsi

106.full_name: 'Abdullah ibn az-Zubayr' b. al-'Awwam b. Khuwailid b. Asad b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Quasyy b. Kilab
106.arabic: عبد الله بن الزبير بن العوام
106.bio: First Muslim to born in Medina among Emigrants.

107.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Abi Bakr('Abdullah) b. 'Uthman b. 'Amir b. 'Amr b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym
107.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن أبي بكر الصديق
107.bio:
Old Name: 'Abdul Ka'ba or 'Abdul 'Uzza (changed to 'Abdullah)
His endeavor and striving on the Day of Al-Yamaamah will never be forgotten. His firm resistance and bravery played a great role in achieving victory against the apostate army of Musailamah. It was he, Abd Ar-Rahman, who killed Muhkam Ibn At-Tufail, Musailamah's schemer and the main guard of the castle inside which the apostate army took refuge.

108.full_name: 'Abdullah ibn Ja'far ibn Abī Tālib b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
108.arabic: عبد الله بن جعفر بن أبي طالب

110.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Abi Bakr('Abdullah) b. 'Uthman b. 'Amir b. 'Amr b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah

111.short_name: Abu Dujana, Simak bin Aus bin Kharasha
111.full_name: Simak bin Aus bin Kharasha bin Luadhan b. 'Abdu Wudd b. Zayd b. Tha'labah b.al-Khazraj b. Sa'ida
111.arabic: سماك بن خرشة أبو دجانة الأنصاري
111.mother_name: Huzma bint Harmala of B. Salim b. Mansur
111.bio: Brotherhood was made b/w him and 'Utba bin Ghazwan.

112.full_name: al-Mundhir bin 'Amr b. Khunays (b. Haritha) b. Luadhan b. 'Abdu Wudd b. Zayd b. Tha'laba
112.bio: Brotherhood was made b/w him and Tulayb bin 'Umair

113.full_name: Abu Usayd Malik bin Rabi'a b. Badiy(al-badan) b. 'Amir b. 'Auf b. Haritha b. 'Amr b. al-Khazraj
113.arabic: مالك بن ربيعة أبو أسيد الساعدي الأنصاري
113.bio: The last one of people of Badr to Die. Other date of deaths are given (75 AH or 80 AH or even 40 AH or 30 AH)

114.full_name: Zayd ibn al-Khattab bin Nufayl b. 'Abd al-Uzza b. Riyah b. Abdullah b. Qurt b. Razah b. 'Adi b. Ka'b
114.arabic: زيد بن الخطاب بن نفيل العدوي
114.mother_name: Asma' bint Wahb bin Habib bin Harith Asadi
114.bio:
In the battle against Musaylimah, Zayd ibn al-Khattab called out to the forces:

    Men, bite with your jaw teeth, strike the enemy and press on. By God, I shall not speak to you after this until either Musaylamah is defeated or I meet God."

He then charged against the enemy and continued fighting until he was killed. "

115.full_name: Basheer bin 'Abdul Mundhir b. Zanbar b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
115.bio:
Full Lineage: Basheer bin 'Abdul Mundhir b. Zanbar b. Zayd b. Umayya b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
Prophet(ﷺ) sent him back from Badr to make care taker of Medina. He did receive the spoils of the war.
115.spouses: Nusayba bint Faddala of B.Umayya of B.'Amr B.'Auf,1290

116.full_name: Sakhr ibn Harb ibn Umayyah b. 'Abd Shams b. A'bd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
116.bio: He was a leading man of the Quraish of Mecca. He was a staunch opponent of the prophet Muhammad(ﷺ) before reverting to Islam later in his life.
116.spouses: Ṣafiyah bint Abu al-'Aṣ,Zainab bint Nawful,Safiyah bint Abu 'Amr,74,3187

117.full_name: Mughira ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
117.arabic: أبو سفيان بن الحارث بن عبد المطلب
117.bio:
During the caliphate of Umar, may God be pleased with him, Abu Sufyan felt his end drawing near. One
day people saw him in al-Baqi, the cemetery not far from the Prophet's mosque where many Sahabah are
buried. He was digging and fashioning a grave. They were surprised. Three days later, Abu Sufyan was
lying stretched out at home His family stood around weeping but he said: Do not weep for me. By God,
I did not commit any wrong since I accepted Islam." With that, he passed away."

118.full_name: Ja'far ibn Abi Sufyan ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd manaf b. Quasyy b. Kilab
118.bio: He accepted Islam with his father before the opening of Makkah.

119.full_name: Miqsam/Laqeet ibn al-Rabi' bin 'Abdul-'Uzza bin 'Abd Shams bin 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. kilab

120.full_name: Musham/Hashim ibn 'Utbah b. Rabi'a b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
120.arabic: أبو حذيفة بن عتبة بن ربيعة بن عبد شمس

121.full_name: 'Uthman bin Maz'un b. Habib b. Wahb b. Hudhafa b. Jumah b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b
121.father_name: Maz'un b. Habib b. Wahb b. Hudhafa
121.mother_name: Sakhila bint 'Unais b. Wahaban b. Wahb b. Hudhafa
121.bio: Migrated to Abyssinia Twice. Brotherhood was made between him and Abi al-Hiathum bin al-Tihaan. First person to be buried in Baqi'.

122.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Maz'un b. Habib b. Wahb b. Hudhafa b. Jumah b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b
122.father_name: Maz'un b. Habib  b. Wahb b. Hudhafa
122.mother_name: Sakhila bint 'Unais b. Wahaban b. Wahb b. Hudhafa
122.bio: Witnessed Badr, Uhud, Khandaq and others. The brotherhood was made b/w him and Sahl bin 'Ubaid bin al-Ma'li in Medina after Hijra.

123.full_name: 'Imran bin Husain b. 'Ubayd b. Khalaf b. 'Abd Nahm b. Salm b. GHadara b. Salul b. Habsha b. Ka'b
123.bio:
عمران بن حصين بن عبيد بن خلف بن عبد نهم بن سالم بن غاضرة بن سلول بن حبشة بن سلول بن كعب بن عمرو الخزاعي
He joined Prophet(ﷺ) in the 7 AH (year of Khaybar) with his father, sister and Abu Huraira (RA).

124.full_name: Zaynab bint Maz'un b. Habib b. Wahb b. Hudhafa b. Jumah b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b
124.arabic: زينب بنت مظعون بن حبيب الجمحية

125.full_name: Umm Waraqa bint 'Abdullah bin al-Harith b. 'Uwaymar b. Naufal al-Ansaria
125.arabic: أم ورقة بنت عبد الله بن الحارث
125.bio: She was allowed by Prophet(ﷺ) to lead woman at her house. She also collected Qu'ran. She was killed by 2 of her slaves during the 'Umar Khilafat as predicted by Prophet(ﷺ) that she is Martyr!"."

126.bio: When she embraced Islam, she was tortured by Quraish until she lost her eye sight. Quraish said it was due to wrath of their idol gods Lat and 'Uzza. She told them that it is Allah who blinded her and he can restore it. Next morning her sight was back! Se was freed by Abu Bakr(RA).

127.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman ibn Usama bin 'Amr b. 'Abdullah b. Jabir b. .. b. 'Amir b. Malik b. Layth .. b. Kinana

128.full_name: Qutham ibn al-'Abbas bin 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
128.arabic: قثم بن العباس بن عبد المطلب
128.bio: He resembled the Prophet(ﷺ). He was Governor of Mecca on Ali' behalf and conducted the Hajj.

129.full_name: Malik bin Mas'ud b. Badiy(al-badan) b. 'Amir b. 'Auf b. Haritha b. 'Amr b. al-Khazraj

130.arabic: ثوبان مولى رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم
130.bio: According to some sources, his ancestors were from Yemen. He stayed with prophet(ﷺ) throughout his life.

131.full_name: 'Abdullah ('Abd Rabb) bin Haq b. Aws n. Waqsh b. Tha'laba b. Tarif b. al-Khazraj b. Sa'ida
131.arabic: عبد الله (عبد رب) بن حق بن أوس

132.full_name: Bashir ibn Sa'd b. Tha'laba b. Jilas(Khilas) b. Zayd b. Malik b. Tha'laba b. Ka'b b. al-Khazraj
132.mother_name: Anisa bint Khalifa b. 'Ady of B.al-Harith B.al-Kha

133.full_name: 'Ubaydallah bin al-'Abbas bin 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
133.arabic: عبيد الله بن العباس بن عبد المطلب

134.full_name: Amina bint 'Amr bin Harb bin Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab

135.full_name: al-Fadl ibn al-'Abbas bin 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b.Kilab b. Murrah
135.arabic: الفضل بن العباس بن عبد المطلب
135.bio: He ride with the Messenger of Allah peace be upon him in the Farewell Pilgrimage and participated in the washing of the body of Messenger of Allah peace be upon him.

136.full_name: Habibah or Umm Habib bint Jahsh bin Ri'ab b. Ya'mar b. sabra b. Murra b. Kabir b. Ghanm b. Dudan

137.bio: She was tortured by 'Umar bin al-Khattab (before his Islam)

138.full_name: Damra bin ('Amr b.) Ka'b b. 'Amr b. 'Adi b. 'Amir b. Rafa'a b. Kaleeb of B. Juhayna

139.arabic: حبيبة بنت أم حبيبة بنت أبي سفيان

140.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Abi Umayyah (Suhayl Zad al-Rakb) b. al-Mughira b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum
140.arabic: عبد الله بن أبي أمية المخزومي
140.father_name: Abu Umayyah b. al-Mughirah b. 'Abdullah Makhzumi

141.full_name: Lubaba al-Sughra(al-'Asma) bint al-Harith bin Hazn b. Bujair b. al-Hizm b. Ru'ayba b. 'Abdullah
141.mother_name: Fakhitah bint Amir b. Mu'attib b. Malik al-Thaqafi

142.full_name: Ziyad bin Ka'b bin 'Amr b. 'Adi b. 'Amir b. Rafa'a b. Kaleeb of B. Juhayna
142.father_name: Ka'b bin 'Amr b. 'Adi b. 'Amir b. Rafa'a

143.full_name: Muhammad bin Abi Hudhayfah b. 'Utbah b. Rabi'a b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
143.arabic: محمد بن أبي حذيفة بن عتبة

144.full_name: Hisham ibn Al-Aas  ibn Wa'il b. Hashim b. Sa'd b. Sahm b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b b. Lua'yy
144.mother_name: umm Harmalah bint Hisham bin al-Mughira

145.full_name: Hudhayfah ibn al-Yaman(Husayl or Hisl) bin Jabir b. Rabi'a b. Jarwa al-'Absi
145.bio: He migrated with Prophet(ﷺ). He knew the names of Hypocrite as told to him by Prophet(ﷺ).

146.short_name: Buzay'a bint Abi Kharija bin Aws
146.full_name: Buzay'a bint Abi Kharija bin Aws b. al-Sakan b. 'Adi b. 'Ubaid b. Fihr b. Tha'laba b. Ghanm b. 'Auf
146.arabic: بزيعة بنت أبي خارجة بن أوس
146.father_name: Abu Kharija bin Aws b. al-Sakan

147.full_name: Ikrimah ibn Abi Jahl b. Hisham b. al-Mughirah b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum
147.father_name: Abu Jahl ('Amr) b. Hisham b. al-Mughirah Makhzumi
147.mother_name: Umm Mujalid bint Yurbu' b. Hilal b. 'Amir
147.bio: He became Muslim on the day of Opening of Makkah.

148.full_name: Nu'man bin Malik b. Tha'laba b. da'd b. Fihr b. Tha'laba b. Ghanm b. Salm b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
148.arabic: النعمان بن مالك بن ثعلبة بن دعد
148.bio: There is some confusion over the name of the person who was martyred at Badr.

149.full_name: Khabbab ibn al-Aratt b. Jandalah b. Sa`d b. Khuzayma b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Zayd Manat b. Tamim
149.bio:
Khabbab was from the Banu Tamim clan in Najd. The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Jabr/Jabir bin 'Atik b. Qays
Before Muhammad started his mission and Khabbab was obviously not yet in his teens", one of the Arab tribes raided their territory and took their cattle and captured women and children. Khabbab was among the youths captured. He was passed from one hand to another until he ended up in Makkah, in the slave market of that city. A woman named Umm Anmaar who belonged to the Banu Khuza'a clan of the Quraish tribe in Mecca went there. She wanted to buy herself a youth for her domestic chores and to exploit his labour for economic gains. As she scrutinized the faces of those who were displayed for sale, her eyes fell on Khabbab. She saw that he was strong and healthy and that there were clear signs of intelligence on his face. She needed no further incentive to purchase him. She paid and walked away with her new slave. On the way home, Umm Anmaar and Khabbab had a conversation where Khabbab explained his background. Umm Anmaar placed the young Khabbab as an apprentice to one of the blacksmiths in Makkah to learn the art of making swords. Khabbab learnt quickly and was soon an expert at the craft. When he was strong enough, Umm Anmaar set up a workshop for him with all the necessary tools and equipment for making swords. Soon he was quite famous in Makkah for his excellent craftsmanship. People also liked dealing with him because of his honesty and integrity. Umm Anmaar gained much profit through him and exploited his talents to the full.
Khabbab did not hide his acceptance of Islam from anyone and when the news of his becoming a Muslim reached Umm Anmaar, she became incensed with anger. She went to her brother Siba'a ibn Abd al-Uzza who gathered a gang of youths from the Banu Khuza'a and together they made their way to Khabbab. They found him completely engrossed in his work. Siba'a went up to him and said: "We have heard some news from you which we don't believe." "What is it?" asked Khabbab. "We have been told that you have given up your religion and that you now follow that man from the Banu Hashim ." I have not given up my religion," replied Khabbab calmly. "I only believe in One God Who has no partner. I reject your idols and I believe that Muhammad is the servant of God and His messenger." As soon as he spoke these words did Siba'a and his gang set upon him. They beat him with their fists and with iron bars and they kicked him until he fell unconscious to the ground, with blood streaming from the wounds he received. "

150.full_name: Khālid bin Sa`īd ibn al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
150.arabic: خالد بن سعيد بن العاص بن أمية
150.father_name: Sa`īd ibn al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams
150.mother_name: Umm Khalid bint Khabab b. 'Abd al-kanani
150.bio: He was also Umm Habiba's wali when she married Muhammad(ﷺ) while she was in Abyssinia.

151.full_name: Usama bin 'Amr b. 'Abdullah b. Jabir b. Bashr b. 'Utwara b. 'Amir b. Malik b. Layth .. b. Kinana

152.full_name: Khunays ibn Hudhaifa b. Qays b. 'Adi b. Sa'd b. Sahm b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b b. Lua'yy
152.mother_name: Dha'ifah bint Hudhuam b. Sa'id al-Sahmi

153.full_name: Mandwas bint 'Ubada ibn Dulaim b. Haritha b. Abu Hazima b. Tha'laba b. Tarif b. al-Khazraj
153.arabic: مندوس بنت عبادة بن دليم الأنصارية

154.full_name: Layla bint 'Ubada ibn Dulaim b. Haritha b. Abu Hazima b. Tha'laba b. Tarif b. al-Khazraj

155.full_name: Fukayha bint 'Ubayd ibn Dulaim b. Haritha b. Abu Hazima b. Tha'laba b. Tarif b. al-Khazraj
155.arabic: فكيهة بنت عبيد بن دليم الأنصارية

156.full_name: Lubaba (kubra) bint al-Harith b. Hazn b. Bujair b. al-Hizm b. Ru'ayba b. 'Abdullah b. Hilal b. 'Amir
156.bio: Umm Fadl claimed to be the second woman to convert to Islam, the same day as her close friend Khadijah.

157.full_name: Sa'id bin Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah ibn Dulaim b. Haritha b. Abu Hazima b. Tha'laba b. Tarif b. al-Khazraj
157.arabic: سعيد بن سعد بن عبادة الأنصاري

158.full_name: Ishaq bin Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah ibn Dulaim b. Haritha b. Abu Hazima b. Tha'laba b. Tarif b. al-Khazraj
158.arabic: إسحاق بن سعد بن عبادة الأنصاري

159.full_name: Malik bin al-Dukhsham b. Malik bin al-Dukhsham b. Mardhaka b. Ghanm b. Salm b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
159.mother_name: 'Amira bint Sa'd of B.al-Harith b. Al-Khazraj
159.bio: According to some sources, he was present at second Aqaba.

160.full_name: al-Furay'a bint Malik bin al-Dukhsham b. Malik bin al-Dukhsham b. Mardhaka b. Ghanm b. Salm b. 'Auf

161.full_name: Qurratul-'Ayn bint 'Ubada b. b. Nadla b. Malik b. al-'Ajlan b. Zayd b. Ghanm b. Salm b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
161.arabic: قرة العين بنت عبادة بن نضلة

162.full_name: Al-Fa'rah bint Abi Sufyan bin Harb bin Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
162.arabic: الفارعة بنت أبي سفيان بن حرب
162.bio: According to some scholars, She went to Abyssinia with her husband.

163.full_name: al-Miqdad ibn 'Amr b. Tha'laba b. Malik b. Rabi'ah b. 'Amir
163.father_name: 'Amr b. Tha'labah b. Malik b. Rabi'ah
163.bio:
Miqdad ibn Aswad Al-Kindi belonged to the Kunda tribe. He escaped from his tribe and inhabited Mecca. In Mecca, Miqdad belonged to a man named Al-Aswad bin Abid Yaqut. So, people started calling him Miqdad ibn Aswad. Islam rose from the top of the Hira Mount. Miqdad ibn Aswad Al-Kindi became twenty-four years old. He heard about the Islamic Prophet Muhammad’s mission. He hurried to believe in the new religion. He kept his Islam a secret. He met the Islamic Prophet Muhammad secretly. Thus, he was among the earlier Muslims. He always felt the Muslims' sufferings.
The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Jabbar bin Sakhr of B.Salima.
163.students: 5,19,880,11400,11005,10915,أبو معمر عبد الله بن سنحبرة الأزدي,11196,4097,11895,زوجته ضباعة بنت الزبير بن عبد المطلب,11116,ابنته ضباعة علي خلاف في ذلك

164.full_name: Talib ibn Abī Tālib b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
164.bio: Cousin of Muhammad(ﷺ) and brother of Ali, He was the eldest of the four sons of Fatima bint Asad who raised Muhammad(ﷺ).

165.full_name: 'Aqeel ibn Abī Tālib ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
165.bio: Aqeel was second of four sons of Abu Talib, who was the uncle and protector of Muhammad (ﷺ). Aqeel's nickname was Abu Yazid. He fought in the Battle of Mu'tah and became blind late in life, dying at the age of 96.

166.full_name: al-Mughira ibn Shu'ba bin Abi 'Amir b. Mas'ud b. Mu'tab b. Malik b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Sa'd b. 'Auf
166.mother_name: Asma' bint al-Afqam of B.Dahman b. Nasr
166.bio: المغيرة بن شعبة بن أبي عامر بن مسعود بن معتب بن مالك بن كعب بن عمرو بن سعد بن عوف بن ثقيف

167.full_name: Muhammad Ibn Maslama b. Salama b. Khalid b. 'Adi b. Majda'a b. Haritha b. al-Harith b.al-Khazraj
167.bio: He has total 10 boys and 6 girls. The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Abu 'Ubiada bin al-Jarrah.

168.full_name: Muhammad ibn Abi Bakr('Abdullah) b. 'Uthman b. 'Amir b. 'Amr b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah
168.bio: He was born during Farewell Hajj.

169.full_name: 'Abdullah ibn Usama bin 'Amr b. 'Abdullah b. Jabir b. .. b. 'Amir b. Malik b. Layth .. b. Kinana
169.arabic: عبد الله بن شداد بن الهاد الليثي
169.bio: Full lineage: 'Abdullah ibn bin 'Amr b. 'Abdullah b. Jabir b. Bashr b. 'Utwara b. 'Amir b. Malik b. Layth b. Bakr b. 'Abdul Manat b. Kinana

170.full_name: Aus bin As-Samit b. Qays b. Asram b. Fihr b. Tha'laba b. Ghanm b. Salm b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
170.arabic: أوس بن الصامت بن قيس بن أصرم
170.bio:
The beginning of Surah Al-Mujadilah (The Woman who disputes) was revealed about him and his wive.
1. Indeed Allah has heard the statement of her (Khaulah bint Tha'labah) that disputes with you (O Muhammad ) concerning her husband (Aus bin As-Samit), and complains to Allah. And Allah hears the argument between you both. Verily, Allah is All-Hearer, All-Seer. 2. Those among you who make their wives unlawful (Az-Zihar) to them by saying to them You are like my mother's back." They cannot be their mothers. None can be their mothers except those who gave them birth. And verily, they utter an ill word and a lie. And verily, Allah is Oft-Pardoning, Oft-Forgiving. 3. And those who make unlawful to them (their wives) (by Az-Zihar) and wish to free themselves from what they uttered, (the penalty) in that case (is) the freeing of a slave before they touch each other. That is an admonition to you (so that you may not return to such an ill thing). And Allah is All-Aware of what you do. 4. And he who finds not (the money for freeing a slave) must fast two successive months before they both touch each other. And for him who is unable to do so, he should feed sixty of Miskin (poor). That is in order that you may have perfect Faith in Allah and His Messenger. These are the limits set by Allah. And for disbelievers, there is a painful torment. 5. Verily, those who oppose Allah and His Messenger (Muhammad ) will be disgraced, as those before them (among the past nation), were disgraced. And We have sent down clear Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.). And for the disbelievers is a disgracing torment."

171.arabic: سلمى أم رافع امرأة أبي رافع
171.bio: It is also said she was client of Safiyya bint 'Abdul Muttalib (Prophet's Aunt). She was midwife for the children of Prophet(ﷺ).

172.full_name: Qays ibn Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah ibn Dulaim b. Haritha b. Abu Hazima b. Tha'laba b. Tarif b. al-Khazraj
172.arabic: قيس بن سعد بن عبادة الأنصاري
172.students: 19,11196,5004,11644,11052,15368,10511,10834,10863,11219,الصحيح أن بينهما رجلا,يسار أبو نجيح والد عبد الله يقال مرسل

173.full_name: Naufal bin 'Abdullah bin Nadla b. Malik b. al-'Ajlan b. Zayd b. Ghanm b. Salm b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
173.arabic: نوفل بن عبد الله بن نضلة الأنصاري

174.full_name: Rabi'ah ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hasim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
174.arabic: ربيعة بن الحارث بن عبد المطلب

175.full_name: 'Amir  ibn Abi Waqqas (Malik) bin Uhaib bin 'Abd Manaf bin Zuhrah bin Kilab b. Murrah b. Ka'b
175.mother_name: Hamnah bint Sufyan bin Umayyah bin 'Abd Shams
175.bio: He went directly to Medinah in the 2 boats from Abyssinia in 7 AH.

176.full_name: 'Amra bint Mas'ud bin Qays b. 'Amr b. Zayd Manat b. 'Adi b. 'Amr b. Malik b. al-Najjar
176.arabic: عمرة بنت مسعود بن قيس الرابعة
176.mother_name: 'Amira bint 'Amr bin Haram of  B.Malik B.al-Najjar

177.full_name: Nawfal ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
177.arabic: نوفل بن الحارث بن عبد المطلب
177.bio: The eldest convert to Islam among the Banu Hashim after the battle of Badr. Brotherhood was made between him and 'Abbas bin 'Abdul Muttalib.

178.full_name: Ghaziyya/'Adya bint Sa'd ibn Khalifa b. al-Ashraf b. Abu Hazima b. Tha'laba b. Tarif b. al-Khazraj

179.full_name: 'Abdullah ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
179.arabic: عبد الله بن الحارث بن عبد المطلب

180.bio: Adopted son of Abu Hudhayfah bin 'Utba. He was originally a slave of a woman from Aws. Quran reader and early Imam in Medina.

181.full_name: 'Ammara or Umama bint Hamza ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab

182.full_name: Suhayb bin Sinan b. Malik b. 'Abd b. 'Amr b. 'Aqeel b. 'Amir b. Jandalah b. S'ad of al-Namr b. Qasit
182.arabic: صهيب بن سنان بن مالك الرومي
182.mother_name: Salma bint Ta'id of b. Malik b. 'Amr b. Tamim
182.bio: He was was tortured to the extent that he lost control over what he said. He left his wealth in Makkah to win his freedom when he migrated to Medina.

183.full_name: 'Ubaydah ibn al-Harith b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
183.bio: He was a cousin of Muhammad and Ali, and he was the first Martyr of the battle of Badr.

184.full_name: Muhammad  ibn Ja'far ibn Abī Tālib b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab
184.arabic: محمد بن جعفر بن أبي طالب

185.full_name: Awn ibn Ja'far ibn Abī Tālib b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra
185.arabic: عون بن جعفر بن أبي طالب الهاشمي

186.full_name: Umm Kulthum bint 'Amr bin Jarwal Khuza'iyah
186.arabic: أم كلثوم بنت عمرو بن جرول الخزاعية

187.full_name: Umm Shareek, Ghaziya bint Jabir bin Hakim al-Daus from Azd or Ansariyya or 'Amiriyya
187.bio: Umm Shareek a lady who accepted Islam was made to stand under the hot sun for three days, and was not allowed to drink water.

188.bio: There are some confusion whether al-Nahdiyya was the mother Umm 'Ubays. Abu Bakr(RA) freed both of them.
188.spouses: Kurz bin Rabi'a of B.'Abd Shams

189.full_name: 'Uqbah ibn 'Amir b. 'Abs b. 'Amr b. 'Ady b. 'Amr b. Rifa'a b. Muwadu'a b. 'Ady b. Ghanm b. al-Rab'a
189.bio:
Also Known as: Abu Hammad, Abu Sa'ad, Abu 'Amr, Abu al-Aswad
He was one of the commanders of the Muslim forces that liberated Egypt. For three years he was the Muslim governor of Egypt after which he received orders from the Caliph Mua'wiyah to mount a naval expedition to the island of Rhodes in the Mediterranean Sea.

190.full_name: 'Urwah ibn Mas'ud bin Mu'tab b. Malik b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Sa'd b. 'Auf al-Thaqafi
190.arabic: عروة بن مسعود بن معتب الثقفي
190.mother_name: Sa'biya bint 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Quasyy
190.bio: عروة بن مسعود بن معتب بن مالك بن كعب بن عمرو بن سعد بن عوف بن ثقيف

191.arabic: أيمن بن عبيد بن زيد بن عمرو

192.full_name: 'Abdullah b. Zama'a b. al-Aswad b. al-Muttalib b. Asad b. 'Abd al-'Uzza b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
192.arabic: عبد الله بن زمعة بن الأسود بن المطلب
192.father_name: Zama'a b. al-Aswad b. al-Muttalib b. Asad
192.mother_name: Qaribah al-kubra bint Abi Umayyah Makhzumi

193.full_name: Mulayl bin Wabara bin Khalid b. al-'Ajlan b. Zayd b. Ghanm b. Salm b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
193.arabic: مليل بن وبرة بن خالد بن العجلان
193.spouses: Umm Zayd bint Nadla b. Malik

194.full_name: Habiba bint Mulayl bin Wabara bin Khalid b. al-'Ajlan b. Zayd b. Ghanm b. Salm b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
194.arabic: حبيبة بنت مليل بن وبرة بن خالد
194.mother_name: Umm Zayd bint Nadla b. Malik

195.full_name: Bushra bint Mulayl bin Wabara bin Khalid b. al-'Ajlan b. Zayd b. Ghanm b. Salm b. 'Auf b. 'Amr
195.arabic: بشرة بنت مليل بن وبرة بن خالد
195.mother_name: Umm Zayd bint Nadla b. Malik
195.spouses: Hamza bin al-'Abbas b. 'Ubada b. Nadla

196.full_name: 'Atikah bint Zayd b. 'Amr b. Nufayl b. 'Abd al-Uzza b. Riyah b. 'Abdullah b. Qurt b. Razah b. 'Adi
196.arabic: عاتكة بنت زيد بن عمرو بن نفيل
196.mother_name: Fatima bint Ba'aja bin Umayyah bin Khuwailid

197.full_name: Tulayb bin 'Umayr ibn Wahb b. Kathir b. 'Abd b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah b. Ka'b
197.bio: Brotherhood was made b/w him and al-Mundhir bin 'Amr al-Sai'di

198.full_name: Fakhitah/Hind bint Abi Talib b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murra
198.bio:
Cousin of Muhammed(ﷺ) and Sister of Ali. Other names: Hind, 'Atika
Her husband died as non-believer.
198.spouses: Hubairah ibn Abi Wahab b. Amr al-Makhzumi

199.full_name: Jumanah bint Abī Tālib b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
199.arabic: جمانة بنت أبي طالب بن عبد المطلب
199.bio: Cousin of Muhammad(ﷺ) and Sister of Ali.
